ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., Active, Inactive, Suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Editor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's permissions and responsibilities */,
  "parent_role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent role in the hierarchy */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is a default role for new users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user-role assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user-role assignment */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the role */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the role assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_assigned_by FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the action (e.g., before and after states) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the permission allows */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the permission (e.g., Content, Users, Roles) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission assignment */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission assigned to the role */,
  "is_inherited" INTEGER /* Indicates if the permission is inherited from a parent role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_logs" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the session */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user logged out */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_hierarchies" (
  "hierarchy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hierarchy entry */,
  "parent_role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent role */,
  "child_role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child role */,
  "inherited_permissions" INTEGER /* Indicates if the child role inherits all permissions from the parent role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hierarchy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_hierarchies_child_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_hierarchies_parent_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "status_logs" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose status is changed */,
  "status" TEXT /* New status of the user (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the status was changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who changed the status */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_status_logs_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_status_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who receives the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was created */,
  "is_urgent" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification is urgent */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
